# Synced from dcouple/orchestra — do not edit here

This directory is a one-way mirror of `claude/skills/` in
[dcouple/orchestra](https://github.com/dcouple/orchestra). Any edit made in a
consumer repo is overwritten by the next sync PR. Change skills in orchestra.

Repo-specific configuration (e.g. work-item tracking and any artifact
provider) belongs in this repo's `CLAUDE.md` / `AGENTS.md`, never in these
files. Exception: `provider-*` skill directories are consumer-owned artifact
providers (contract: `.references/artifact-provider.md`) — the sync leaves
them alone.
